description: The result of processing an import set record including the transformation outcome.

transform_map.description: The name of the transform map used to process the record.

table.description: The target table into which the record was transformed.

display_name.description: The display name of the transform map.

display_value.description: The display value of the target record created or updated.

record_link.description: A link to the target record in ServiceNow.

status.description: The transformation status. Common values include inserted, updated, error, and ignored.

status_message.description: A descriptive message about the transformation result, especially useful when the status is error.

sys_id.description: The sys_id of the import set row record in the staging table.

target_sys_id.description: The sys_id of the record created or updated in the target table.

import_set.description: The sys_id of the parent import set.

title: ImportSetResult
